items.title: Interpol Ready New Album, Share Two Songs
items.summary: The band has signed to Partisan for its first LP in four years, This Mirror Weighs a Ton

items.title: Soft Cell Unveil Final Album Danceteria
items.summary: A tribute to the New York club and Soft Cell co-founder Dave Ball, who died last year after the album’s completion

items.title: Kelsey Lu Announces Fall Tour Dates
items.summary: It kicks off this September in Philadelphia
